mapper.select:
SELECT ot.owned_id, ot.own_status,
tm.model_id, tm.manufacturer, tm.name, tm.transport_category, ot.decal, tm.lap_time, tm.top_speed, tm.price, tm.release_date,
g.garage_id, g.name AS garage_name, g.type AS garage_type, ots.slot_no
FROM owned_transport ot INNER JOIN transport_model tm ON tm.model_id = ot.model_id LEFT JOIN owned_transport_storage ots ON ots.owned_id = ot.owned_id LEFT JOIN garage g ON g.garage_id = ots.garage_id
ORDER BY g.sort_order IS NULL, g.sort_order ASC, ots.slot_no IS NULL, ots.slot_no ASC, ot.owned_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO owned_transport ( model_id, decal, own_status ) VALUES ( #{modelId}, #{decal}, COALESCE(#{ownStatus}, '보유') )
INSERT INTO owned_transport_storage ( owned_id, garage_id, slot_no ) VALUES ( #{ownedId}, #{garageId}, #{slotNo} )
INSERT INTO owned_transport_storage ( owned_id, garage_id, slot_no, moved_at ) VALUES ( #{ownedId}, #{garageId}, #{slotNo}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE owned_transport_storage SET garage_id = #{garageId}, slot_no = #{slotNo}, moved_at = NOW() WHERE owned_id = #{ownedId}
